prestazioni: 426 Hemi (A102) engine block reinforced with a Dart Machinery iron block (PN: 31100000) for 1,500+ HP capability, featuring billet main caps and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs (PN: 230-4706) to handle 30+ PSI of boost from a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbo (PN: 807188-5002S) with a Tial MV-R 64mm wastegate (PN: MVR-64) and 4-inch V-band downpipe

Holley Dominator EFI X (PN: 556-112) standalone ECU with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps (PN: 0 580 254 953) feeding ID1700x injectors (PN: 1700xDS) and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F20000), paired with a Peterson Fluid Systems dry-sump oiling system (PN: 08-000) featuring a 4-stage pump and -12AN lines

Mopar Performance Stage V valvetrain with Jesel shaft-mount rockers (PN: KMS-30002), titanium retainers (PN: 91200), and COMP Cams solid roller camshaft (PN: 11-771-9) with 0.710" lift, 270° duration at 0.050", and 112° LSA, paired with a TCI Rattler 2500 torque converter (PN: 450000) and a G-Force GF5R 5-speed transmission (PN: GF5R-17) with a 2.95:1 first gear
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (PN: RB-WB-PLY-68) with custom carbon fiber fenders, extended 3.5" per side, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (PN: 3M-1080-M213) and blacked-out BBS LM-R wheels (PN: LM-R 9Jx18 ET15) with Nitto NT05R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)

Custom fabricated steel hood with a 4" cowl induction scoop and integrated NACA ducts feeding the Garrett turbo, finished in gloss black powder coat with a functional hood pin kit from Hotchkis (PN: 10100)

Rear quarter panel-mounted custom LED taillight assembly (inspired by the 1970 Superbird) with sequential turn signals, integrated with a Morimoto XB LED headlight conversion (PN: 26148) and a custom front splitter from APR Performance (PN: PP-4210) with adjustable dive planes
